subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Thee, my God and my Beloved! Thy Fire is burning in me, O my Lord, and I feel its glowing in every member of my weak body.
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love as fire
